creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
There used to be a configure knob, --without-makeinfo, but it was removed a few years ago.  There was some discussion at

https://debbugs.gnu.org/cgi/bugreport.cgi?bug=46837.

On my build server, before this change, the build took 00:01:47.
With this change, it took 00:01:45.
With this change and adding ALL_TARGET=lisp, it still takes 00:01:45.

I only had time tonight to take a quick look at the logs, but I don't think we are rebuilding all the info files.  I see lots of: 

gmake[2]: Nothing to be done for 'info'.
